name: papyrus
description: Offline-first intelligent multi-format document transformation harness

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/shared && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/ir && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/parsers && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/workers && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/orchestrator && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/database && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/ui && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/desktop
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/shared && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/ir && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/parsers && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/workers && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/orchestrator && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/database && npm run build --workspace=@papyrus/ui
